parsed.response: The agent should present a structured review screen to the account operations user. This screen must clearly delineate three sections: records ready for acceptance (which can be processed immediately), records requiring owner attention due to data issues (and specifying the required fix for each), and a final import summary detailing the overall outcome of the batch process.
